subcodes.first_line: We have verily sent unto thee a Spirit from Our presence, and it is My Most Exalted Word, whereby the Bell hath pealed and wailed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ارسلنا الیک روحا من عندنا و هی کلمتی العلیا التی بها صاح الناقوس و تشهق
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
